name: Kai Coffee Hawaii
tagline: A legit local roaster hiding in plain sight on the edge of Waikiki.
mustOrder: Waialua single-origin drip — clean and bright
macadamia nut latte — tastes like Hawaii
parking: Street parking on Monsarrat Ave or park at Kapiolani Park and walk
talkStory: Founded by a local family of coffee farmers, Kai roasts their own beans in-house — rare for a Waikiki-area shop. The Monsarrat Ave location near Diamond Head attracts neighborhood regulars instead of tourists. Their macadamia nut latte uses real mac nuts, not syrup. Buy a bag of their single-origin roast as a souvenir — genuinely better and cheaper than anything at ABC Store. Perfect fuel stop before or after the Diamond Head hike.
